chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-306 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A No.968/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 25.08.2025. Mr. Muhammad Kaleemullah Memon, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto, A.A.G Sindh. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Both the Petitioners are present in-person alongwith their Counsel. The Petitioner No.1 (Mst. Najma) has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2 (Manthar) on account of her free-will and wish without any coercion or compulsion. They have produced the copy of Nikahnama alongwith affidavit of free-will as a proof of their free-will marriage. They further submit that their parents / private Respondents annoyed and going to lodge FIR and also creating hurdles in their smooth life. Mr. Rahpoto, Assistant A.G Sindh, present submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioners. Counsel for the Petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to official Respondents to provide protection to the Petitioners in accordance with law and no such FIR with regard to the alleged abduction of Petitioner No.1 (Mst. Najma) shall be lodged. The SHO PS Jhangro, District Mithi is specifically directed to provide protection to the Petitioners within four corners of law. The Petitioner No.1 (Mst. Najma) present in Court intends to go with her husband Petitioner No.2 (Manthar). Let a copy of this Order be communicated to SSP, Mithi for information and compliance.
Najma) present in Court intends to go with her husband Petitioner No.2 (Manthar). Let a copy of this Order be communicated to SSP, Mithi for information and compliance. JUDGE Ali.
